text: Subah MNC se layoff ka termination email padhte hi mere seene mein ek ajeeb si jakdan aur ghutan shuru ho gayi hai. Ghar par sab ko lagta hai ki main sarkari naukri chhod kar yahan settle hoon, par ab is EMI ke bojh ke beech mere hath-pair barf ki tarah thande pad gaye hain. Dimaag ki nasen fatne ko ho rahi hain aur gala itna sookh gaya hai ki kuch nigla nahi ja raha.

WFH isolation mein jab screen par termination ka mail aaya, toh achanak mere sir mein itna bhayankar dard utha ki aakhon ke aage andhera chha gaya. Papa ne apni kisan wali zameen bech kar meri engineering karwayi thi aur unhe sarkari naukri ka sapna dikhaya tha, par ab is layoff se mere pure badan mein aisi thakan aur kapkapi hai ki main chair se uth bhi nahi pa raha. Mere pet mein aisi marod uth rahi hai jaise koi andar se nichod raha ho.

Startup se nikalne ki khabar milte hi mere kandhon aur peeth mein ek aisi aithan shuru ho gayi hai jo rukne ka naam nahi le rahi. Ghar ki EMI aur bank ka karz sir par hai, aur is khabar ne mere dil ki dhadkan itni tez kar di hai ki lagta hai seena cheer kar bahar aa jayegi. Mujhe lagatar chakkar aa rahe hain aur pure jism mein ek aisi jalan phail rahi hai ki lag raha hai mera shareer abhi jawaab de dega.

Aaj subah termination email dekh kar mere dimaag mein ek zor ki seeti bajne lagi aur mera poora chehra bilkul sunn pad gaya. Pehle hi sarkari naukri ki coaching fail hone ka darr tha, aur ab ye private naukri bhi chali gayi toh mere ghutne dard se kaanp rahe hain. Saans lene mein itni takleef ho rahi hai jaise kisi ne mera dam ghont diya ho, aur pure badan mein ek ajeeb sa bhari-pan mehsus ho raha hai.

MNC se layoff ka mail padhte hi mere gale mein ek ajeeb sa gola phans gaya hai aur meri aawaz bilkul baith gayi hai. Tier-1 city ke kharche aur family honour ka bojh itna hai ki mere hatho ki ungliyan sunn ho gayi hain aur typing karna bhi namumkin lag raha hai. Dimaag mein ek aisi bhayankar thakan chha gayi hai ki mujhe lag raha hai mera poora physical system collapse hone wala hai.
